subcodes.title: Lawh-i-Bismi al-Mazzah (the Humorist)
subcodes.first_line: We are the lovers of Your face, We live outside Your dwelling place, We are the captives of Your hair
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان الحق نطق بلسان الخلق ما عاشقان روی تو ما عاکفان کوی تو ما بستگان موی تو
subcodes.subjects: @mystical themes, @pain of love; love as veil, @love of God, @evanescence and eternality; fana and baqa, @servitude; submission to God; repentance
